market_pulse: Tier-1 venues (XS, OMNIA, Zouk) showcase strong June lineups with resident DJs and major artist debuts; LIV properties maintain competitive EDM positioning with Tiësto, David Guerta, and rising talent.

weekend_readiness.label: MODERATE
factors: Tiësto booking confirmed at LIV Beach (6/19)
OMNIA Dayclub new summer season ramp-up
Josh Baker LIV Nightclub residency launch signals refresh
TAO Beach crowd density concerns (sardine-packed reported)
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Book talent packages early for Friday night; leverage new dayclub positioning vs Omnia Beach opener; monitor Tiësto tier-1 positioning.

content_gaps.description: House/deep house audio (particularly Adrian Lux, Deorro, Major Lazer remixes) prominent in EBC, Encore, and Zouk stories but underutilized in LIV social.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Introduce deep house mixes to Friday reels; partner with @adrianlux or @deorro for 15-sec collab clips highlighting pool-to-club transition audio.

content_gaps.description: Talent meet-and-greets and backstage content missing; competitors show DJ candids and artist hand-offs.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Request BTS access for Josh Baker LIV launch; capture Tiësto soundcheck June 19; post DJ booth POV stories 1hr before doors.

content_gaps.description: Hype videos (crowd reactions, energy peaks) dominate TikTok for OMNIA, Zouk; LIV posts lean informational vs celebratory.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Film 5-10 sec crowd high-moments during peak hours (12-1am); use trending transitions; tag DJ + venue for discovery.
